title: Better Turtle Scute
description: Turtle scutes is difficult to obtain and have very few uses—and we're going to change this state of affairs!
body:
This mod is designed to optimize the gameplay experience of Turtle Scute in Minecraft. In the vanilla game, obtaining Turtle Scute is quite tedious: it only drops when turtles grow, with each turtle dropping just one scute, resulting in extremely low efficiency. Additionally, its use is limited to crafting turtle shells, making the overall reward disproportionate to the effort.

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpack!**

[**简体中文百科：更好的海龟壳**](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/21730.html)

![A new armor equipped as chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25d10a3b7121c658591051ec33501536371352c5_0.webp)
To address this, the mod introduces two small improvements:

**Enhanced Acquisition Method**: Drawing inspiration from the way armadillo scutes are obtained, a more convenient approach is added. Right-clicking an adult turtle with a vanilla Brush will consume 32 durability from the brush and 2 hunger points from the player, yielding 2 Turtle Scutes directly.

- It is compatible with brushes added by the mods [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology) and [More Brushes](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-brushes).

**New Equipment**: The "Turtle Back Shell" is added, which can be equipped in the chestplate slot. Crafted from Turtle Scutes, it has the same durability and armor value as an iron chestplate, plus an additional 20% knockback resistance. Its special effects include: automatically granting "Dolphin's Grace" when entering water to significantly boost swimming speed; if the wearer takes more than 4 damage in a single hit, it immediately triggers "Resistance IV" for 12 seconds (reducing 80% of damage), consuming 10 durability in the process. This effect can be triggered again after 120 seconds.

Starting from Version 1.3 and above: When this effect is triggered, it also grants an 8-point shield for 12 seconds and the "Bad Luck" effect for a certain period of time.

![Brush the turtle to get scutes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/970537a8a93dfdd7dbb92281dec5261f632a3465_0.webp)

![Gaining "Dolphin's Grace" when entering water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2b7f094ec457502da4be60a5a956c0316f3cce_0.webp)

- The mod includes a built-in tool called the Flint Turtle Brush, which has a durability of 32 points. It provides support for the "brush gameplay" for players using MC versions prior to 1.20.
